title: heterotheca bolanderi
intro: Heterotheca bolanderi, also known as Bolander's false goldeneye, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Heterotheca bolanderi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or salves, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for various health applications.
